turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh, hello.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, hi,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Uh

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: No, this is Hank. I'm actually calling about something going on with my foot.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know. Hey!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling to schedule an appointment for yourself or are you calling on behalf of someone else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it’s for me. I’m looking to get an appointment set up. You need anything from me?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your full name and date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it’s Hank Whitaker, and my date of birth is March 9th, 1962.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Hank.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, so

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Can you tell me a bit more about what's going on with your foot?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you having pain, an injury, or something else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It's pain, big time. My big toe joint got all red, swollen, and hot overnight, hurts like crazy even with a sheet touching it. It's gotta be a joint thing, so that’s why I’m calling ortho, right?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: That sounds very uncomfortable, Hank.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Since your pain started suddenly and your joint is red,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: swollen, and hot.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: This sounds urgent.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to schedule an acute visit so you can be seen as soon as possible?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it’s pretty

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’d be great. When’s the soonest you’ve got?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I checked for openings this week, but there are no available appointments right now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to look for the next available slot after this week, or are you open to seeing any provider who has an opening?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’d really like to get in as soon as possible. Yeah, I’m open to any provider if that helps.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: We have several openings tomorrow, Tuesday, June 30th.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you prefer an early morning slot, midday, or later in the afternoon?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let’s go with something early morning if you’ve got it.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The earliest slot tomorrow is at 8.15 a.m. with Dr.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The big new Lekowski

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book that time?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, let's lock that in. 8:15 tomorrow works for me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your appointment is set for tomorrow, Tuesday, June 30th.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: All right,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: at 8.15 a.m. with Dr. Zygdyniu-Lukowski

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs you have.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it,

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, just to be sure—this is a joint issue, right? That’s orthopedic, yeah?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Yes, joint pain and swelling are orthopedic issues.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: All right,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hibbitt Point Orthopedics specializes in joint, bone, and muscle problems, so you're in the right place.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Okay

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If your symptoms get worse before your appointment, like fever or spreading redness,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Call 9-1-1.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or go to the ER.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Understood, I’ll keep that in mind. Thanks for all your help.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're welcome, Hank.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you need anything else, just give us a call.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take care.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, I’m all set. I’ll see you tomorrow. Take care.
